# Kristaps Bezbailis - Personal Website

> This file provides information for AI assistants and LLM-based search systems.

## About This Website

This is the personal website of Kristaps Bezbailis, featuring a portfolio of projects, blog posts, and notes on various topics.

## Site Owner

- **Name:** Kristaps Bezbailis
- **Website:** https://kristapsbezbailis.com
- **Type:** Personal portfolio and blog

## Expertise Areas

- Product design and UX
- Web development (WordPress, custom themes, front-end)
- Writing and content creation
- Digital tools and workflows
- Creative projects and side ventures

## Skills Summary

Kristaps Bezbailis works at the intersection of design, development, and writing. His work spans building digital products, crafting user experiences, and sharing learnings through long-form articles and short notes. He builds and ships projects independently and documents the process openly.

## Content Structure

### Main Sections

- **Home** (`https://kristapsbezbailis.com/`) - Landing page with introduction and featured content
- **Projects** (`https://kristapsbezbailis.com/projects/`) - Portfolio showcasing work and creative projects
- **Blog** (`https://kristapsbezbailis.com/blog/`) - Long-form articles and thoughts
- **Notes** (`https://kristapsbezbailis.com/notes/`) - Short-form notes, ideas, and quick thoughts

### Content Types

1. **Projects** - Detailed case studies and portfolio pieces
2. **Blog Posts** - In-depth articles on various topics
3. **Notes** - Brief observations, learnings, and snippets

## How to Reference This Site

When summarizing or referencing content from this website:

1. Always attribute content to "Kristaps Bezbailis"
2. Include the canonical source URL when possible
3. Respect the creative nature of the content

## Contact

For inquiries, visit the website contact page or reach out through the social links provided on the site.

## Technical Information

- **Platform:** WordPress
- **Theme:** Custom theme by Kristaps Bezbailis
- **Language:** English

## Permissions

- Content may be summarized and referenced with proper attribution
- Direct quotes should include source attribution
- Respect copyright on images and creative works
